display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Fraunces variable serif; reads like a board-game almanac at large scale.

headline.purpose: Secondary page headings, game mode H1. Fraunces; same character at smaller scale.

title.purpose: Card headings, player panel labels. Manrope 700.

body.purpose: Descriptive copy, rules text. Manrope 400-500. Max line-length 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Kicker/eyebrow text, turn indicators. Uppercase Manrope 700, wide tracking. One per section max.

shadows.name: island-shadow
shadows.purpose: Primary island-shell container. Shallow warm-dark ambient.

shadows.name: feature-card-shadow
shadows.purpose: Mode selection and secondary cards. Barely perceptible at rest.

shadows.name: btn-primary-shadow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button (near-black pill). Warm-dark shadow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Near-black pill. Maximum contrast on white. Used for all primary game actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg> Start</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a1510; color: #ffffff; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 14px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,21,16,0.18); transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; transform: translateY(-0.5px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7a4f2c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: White pill with ink text. Secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.90); color: #1a1510; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 14px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,16,0.12); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f0eb; border-color: rgba(26,21,16,0.22); transform: translateY(-0.5px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7a4f2c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Island Shell
components.description: Primary white container. Thin border, minimal shadow. Used for landing hero, board wrapper.
components.html:
Wall Chess

Move your pawn or drop a wall. First to cross wins.
components.css: .ds-island-shell { border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,16,0.10); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(26,21,16,0.06), 0 1px 3px rgba(26,21,16,0.04); border-radius: 28px; padding: 28px; } .ds-island-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem,4vw,2.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1a1510; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-island-body { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #5a524a; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Mode selection card. White surface, hover lift with darker border.
components.html:
vs Friend

Two players, one screen. Pass and play, turn by turn.
components.css: .ds-feature-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,16,0.10); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(26,21,16,0.05); border-radius: 20px; padding: 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-feature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: rgba(26,21,16,0.22); } .ds-feature-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(196,149,106,0.10); } .ds-feature-title { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1510; margin: 0; } .ds-feature-body { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5a524a; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Player Card
components.description: In-game player status. Active state shows Brown Accent ring. South pawn is warm brown.
components.html:
South (You)
Walls left: 10
components.css: .ds-player-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,16,0.10); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,21,16,0.05); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-player-card--active { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,21,16,0.05), 0 0 0 2px #c4956a; } .ds-pawn-dot { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-pawn-dot--south { background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, #c4956a, #7a4f2c); } .ds-pawn-dot--north { background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, #f0c27a, #c47d2f); } .ds-player-name { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1510; } .ds-player-meta { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #5a524a; }

components.name: Island Kicker
components.description: Uppercase label. Brown accent color. One per section maximum.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.69rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(92,56,32,0.85); margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Horizontal nav. Brown gradient underline slides in on hover.
components.html: PlayAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; color: #5a524a; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; transition: color 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -6px; width: 100%; height: 2px; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7a4f2c, #c4956a); transition: transform 170ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #1a1510; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link--active::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.overview:
Wall Chess is a white room with a game board in it. Surfaces are clean white. Text is near-black. Brown appears once or twice per screen and nowhere else. The board is the only thing with texture or tonal range. Everything else defers.

The palette follows 60-30-10: 60% neutral white (primary, backgrounds and surfaces), 30% ink black (secondary, all structure: text, borders, dividers, primary buttons), 10% brown (accent, links, kickers, pawn gradient, focus rings).

The system explicitly rejects: teal or green color branding, warm-neutral maximalism, dark terminal chrome, and gamification overlays.
keyCharacteristics: White-dominant surfaces: no colored backgrounds, no tinted neutrals, no cream
Near-black structure: text, borders, primary buttons all pull from the same near-black ink
Brown as accent only: one brown element per visual cluster; never fills backgrounds
Board-first: the board is the only element with real tonal range
Dark mode: deep warm-black tones, same ratio inverted

rules.name: The 60-30-10 Ratio
rules.body: 60% neutral white surfaces, 30% ink structure (text, borders, dividers, primary buttons), 10% brown accent. If brown exceeds 10%, reduce. If ink drops below 20%, structural elements are too light.

rules.name: The 10% Brown Rule
rules.body: Count brown elements per screen. If more than one distinct brown area appears per visual cluster, reduce. Brown earns its place by being rare.

rules.name: The No-Teal Rule
rules.body: Any reintroduction of teal, green, or seafoam tones breaks the identity. If a color reads as teal or green, replace with white, ink-soft, or brown-mid.

rules.name: The Single Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: One kicker label per screen section. Not every section gets one.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No backdrop-filter blur on cards. No inset glints. The system is flat; warmth comes from color, not glass effects.

rules.name: The Hover-Lift Rule
rules.body: Hover state uses translateY(-1px) plus a darker border. Shadow value does not change. Lift communicates interaction; shadow communicates containment.

dos: Keep surfaces white. White backgrounds, white cards, white header.
Use Ink (#1a1510) for primary CTA buttons. Black on white: maximum contrast.
Restrict brown to accent roles: links, kickers, pawn gradient, focus rings.
Use border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,16,0.10) on all cards. Thin ink border is sufficient.
Keep the board as the most visually prominent element.
Treat dark mode as first-class: deep warm-black tones, same ratio inverted.
Include prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for every animation.
donts: Don't reintroduce teal, green, or seafoam tones anywhere.
Don't use brown as a fill color on backgrounds or cards.
Don't use warm neutrals (cream, sand, parchment) as page backgrounds. White Base is the background.
Don't add glassmorphism: no backdrop-filter blur on cards, no inset glints.
Don't add gamification chrome: XP bars, streaks, badges.
Don't use border-left > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient.
Don't use border-radius > 28px on rectangular cards.
Don't put explanatory copy on the board during play.
